title: amauropelta noveboracensis
intro: Amauropelta noveboracensis, also known as the New York rattlesnake fern, is a type of fern native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. Amauropelta noveboracensis can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
